slides.title: PhD CET Mock Exam 5 - Computer Science
slides.subtitle: 50 Practice MCQs for Doctoral Entrance Examination • Topic 1-5

slides.question: Q1: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Flip-Flops**?
options: Its primary focus is partitioning reflexive-symmetric-transitive relation.
Its primary focus is order-sensitive selection arrangement.
Its primary focus is clock-driven sequential memory components.
Its primary focus is fetch-decode-execute basic loop.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Flip-Flops** is: **clock-driven sequential memory components**.

slides.question: Q2: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Synchronous Counter**?
options: Its primary focus is logic gate reduction optimization.
Its primary focus is reduced uniform instruction set design.
Its primary focus is reflexive-antisymmetric-transitive ordering framework.
Its primary focus is simultaneously-clocked state counter.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Synchronous Counter** is: **simultaneously-clocked state counter**.

slides.question: Q3: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Decoder**?
options: Its primary focus is graphical boolean simplification table.
Its primary focus is binary-to-unary line converter.
Its primary focus is vertex incident edge count.
Its primary focus is floating-point binary representation format.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Decoder** is: **binary-to-unary line converter**.

slides.question: Q4: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Von Neumann Architecture**?
options: Its primary focus is many-to-one signal selector.
Its primary focus is single-visit edge traversal trail.
Its primary focus is shared instruction-data bus architecture.
Its primary focus is compound proposition builders.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Von Neumann Architecture** is: **shared instruction-data bus architecture**.

slides.question: Q5: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Cache Memory Hierarchy**?
options: Its primary focus is multi-level fast memory staging.
Its primary focus is predicate variable scoping symbols.
Its primary focus is one-to-many signal router.
Its primary focus is single-visit vertex traversal loop.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Cache Memory Hierarchy** is: **multi-level fast memory staging**.

slides.question: Q6: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Direct Memory Access (DMA)**?
options: Its primary focus is closure-associativity-identity-inverse algebraic structure.
Its primary focus is cpu-free I/O-memory transfer.
Its primary focus is set manipulation mathematical operations.
Its primary focus is three-input binary addition circuit.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Direct Memory Access (DMA)** is: **cpu-free I/O-memory transfer**.

slides.question: Q7: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Pipelining Hazards**?
options: Its primary focus is instruction pipeline execution stalls.
Its primary focus is partitioning reflexive-symmetric-transitive relation.
Its primary focus is order-sensitive selection arrangement.
Its primary focus is clock-driven sequential memory components.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Pipelining Hazards** is: **instruction pipeline execution stalls**.

slides.question: Q8: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Instruction Cycle**?
options: Its primary focus is reflexive-antisymmetric-transitive ordering framework.
Its primary focus is logic gate reduction optimization.
Its primary focus is simultaneously-clocked state counter.
Its primary focus is fetch-decode-execute basic loop.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Instruction Cycle** is: **fetch-decode-execute basic loop**.

slides.question: Q9: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **RISC Architecture**?
options: Its primary focus is binary-to-unary line converter.
Its primary focus is reduced uniform instruction set design.
Its primary focus is vertex incident edge count.
Its primary focus is graphical boolean simplification table.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **RISC Architecture** is: **reduced uniform instruction set design**.

slides.question: Q10: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **IEEE 754 Standard**?
options: Its primary focus is many-to-one signal selector.
Its primary focus is floating-point binary representation format.
Its primary focus is shared instruction-data bus architecture.
Its primary focus is single-visit edge traversal trail.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **IEEE 754 Standard** is: **floating-point binary representation format**.

slides.question: Q11: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **I/O Buffering**?
options: Its primary focus is speed-matching data storage buffer.
Its primary focus is coffman condition elimination strategy.
Its primary focus is logical module-based memory division.
Its primary focus is excessive paging performance collapse.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **I/O Buffering** is: **speed-matching data storage buffer**.

slides.question: Q12: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Disk Scheduling**?
options: Its primary focus is hard drive head seek optimization.
Its primary focus is hardware-specific control translator program.
Its primary focus is lightweight shared-memory execution unit.
Its primary focus is safe-state resource allocation simulator.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Disk Scheduling** is: **hard drive head seek optimization**.

slides.question: Q13: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **File Allocation Methods**?
options: Its primary focus is single-thread resource lock.
Its primary focus is peripheral device print job spooler.
Its primary focus is elimination of external fragmentation.
Its primary focus is physical disk block mapping strategies.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **File Allocation Methods** is: **physical disk block mapping strategies**.

slides.question: Q14: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **System Calls**?
options: Its primary focus is variable-based process signaling.
Its primary focus is privileged kernel service requests interface.
Its primary focus is process lifecycle stage indicators.
Its primary focus is logical memory expansion.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **System Calls** is: **privileged kernel service requests interface**.

slides.question: Q15: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **RAID Levels**?
options: Its primary focus is redundancy-performance disk array configurations.
Its primary focus is ready queue CPU allocation.
Its primary focus is cpu state saving-restoring overhead.
Its primary focus is fast page table lookup cache.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **RAID Levels** is: **redundancy-performance disk array configurations**.

slides.question: Q16: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Microkernel Architecture**?
options: Its primary focus is minimal kernel user-space service design.
Its primary focus is prevention of race conditions.
Its primary focus is physical memory page eviction policy.
Its primary focus is isolated process communication mechanisms.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Microkernel Architecture** is: **minimal kernel user-space service design**.

slides.question: Q17: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Cache Coherence Protocols**?
options: Its primary focus is coffman condition elimination strategy.
Its primary focus is excessive paging performance collapse.
Its primary focus is multiprocessor cache synchronization.
Its primary focus is speed-matching data storage buffer.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Cache Coherence Protocols** is: **multiprocessor cache synchronization**.

slides.question: Q18: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Memory Segmentation**?
options: Its primary focus is hard drive head seek optimization.
Its primary focus is logical module-based memory division.
Its primary focus is safe-state resource allocation simulator.
Its primary focus is lightweight shared-memory execution unit.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Memory Segmentation** is: **logical module-based memory division**.

slides.question: Q19: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Device Driver**?
options: Its primary focus is hardware-specific control translator program.
Its primary focus is single-thread resource lock.
Its primary focus is physical disk block mapping strategies.
Its primary focus is elimination of external fragmentation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Device Driver** is: **hardware-specific control translator program**.

slides.question: Q20: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Spooling**?
options: Its primary focus is variable-based process signaling.
Its primary focus is peripheral device print job spooler.
Its primary focus is logical memory expansion.
Its primary focus is privileged kernel service requests interface.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Spooling** is: **peripheral device print job spooler**.

slides.question: Q21: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Merge Sort**?
options: Its primary focus is O(n log n) stable comparison sort.
Its primary focus is O(1) average lookup complexity.
Its primary focus is mathematical operation behavior model.
Its primary focus is connectivity and topological sorting tool.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Merge Sort** is: **O(n log n) stable comparison sort**.

slides.question: Q22: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Binary Search**?
options: Its primary focus is efficient priority queue implementation.
Its primary focus is O(log n) sorted array search.
Its primary focus is asymptotic run-time upper bound indicator.
Its primary focus is automatic dead heap memory reclamation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Binary Search** is: **O(log n) sorted array search**.

slides.question: Q23: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Call Stack**?
options: Its primary focus is LIFO element storage collection.
Its primary focus is active subroutine memory tracker.
Its primary focus is name accessibility region code boundary.
Its primary focus is strictly balanced binary search tree.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Call Stack** is: **active subroutine memory tracker**.

slides.question: Q24: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Pointer dereferencing**?
options: Its primary focus is retrieving value from pointer address.
Its primary focus is FIFO element storage collection.
Its primary focus is O(log n) average search time.
Its primary focus is in-place sorting with O(n log n) average time.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Pointer dereferencing** is: **retrieving value from pointer address**.

slides.question: Q25: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Polymorphism**?
options: Its primary focus is single interface multi-implementation capability.
Its primary focus is space-efficient sparse graph representation.
Its primary focus is single-source shortest path optimization.
Its primary focus is one-way pointer node sequence.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Polymorphism** is: **single interface multi-implementation capability**.

slides.question: Q26: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Inheritance**?
options: Its primary focus is two-way pointer node sequence.
Its primary focus is shortest path in unweighted graphs.
Its primary focus is memoization and tabulation paradigm.
Its primary focus is derived-to-base class reuse mechanism.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Inheritance** is: **derived-to-base class reuse mechanism**.

slides.question: Q27: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Encapsulation**?
options: Its primary focus is O(n log n) stable comparison sort.
Its primary focus is O(1) average lookup complexity.
Its primary focus is connectivity and topological sorting tool.
Its primary focus is data-hiding and modular unit bundling.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Encapsulation** is: **data-hiding and modular unit bundling**.

slides.question: Q28: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Abstract Data Type (ADT)**?
options: Its primary focus is mathematical operation behavior model.
Its primary focus is efficient priority queue implementation.
Its primary focus is asymptotic run-time upper bound indicator.
Its primary focus is O(log n) sorted array search.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Abstract Data Type (ADT)** is: **mathematical operation behavior model**.

slides.question: Q29: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Garbage Collection**?
options: Its primary focus is strictly balanced binary search tree.
Its primary focus is active subroutine memory tracker.
Its primary focus is automatic dead heap memory reclamation.
Its primary focus is LIFO element storage collection.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Garbage Collection** is: **automatic dead heap memory reclamation**.

slides.question: Q30: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Variable Scope**?
options: Its primary focus is in-place sorting with O(n log n) average time.
Its primary focus is FIFO element storage collection.
Its primary focus is retrieving value from pointer address.
Its primary focus is name accessibility region code boundary.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Variable Scope** is: **name accessibility region code boundary**.

slides.question: Q31: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Dirty Read**?
options: Its primary focus is theoretical query language foundation.
Its primary focus is eliminating overlapping candidate key anomalies.
Its primary focus is minimal row identifier set.
Its primary focus is reading uncommitted transaction modifications.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Dirty Read** is: **reading uncommitted transaction modifications**.

slides.question: Q32: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Non-Repeatable Read**?
options: Its primary focus is virtual table query abstraction.
Its primary focus is valid foreign-to-primary key reference state.
Its primary focus is reading committed concurrent modifications.
Its primary focus is transaction reliability standards.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Non-Repeatable Read** is: **reading committed concurrent modifications**.

slides.question: Q33: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Phantom Read**?
options: Its primary focus is non-relational schema-less storage.
Its primary focus is reading committed concurrent insertions.
Its primary focus is unnecessary duplicate data storage.
Its primary focus is referential integrity constraint.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Phantom Read** is: **reading committed concurrent insertions**.

slides.question: Q34: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Query Optimizer**?
options: Its primary focus is logical database structure visualization.
Its primary focus is atomic column values requirement.
Its primary focus is disk-optimized indexing structure.
Its primary focus is efficient execution plan selector.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Query Optimizer** is: **efficient execution plan selector**.

slides.question: Q35: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Database Trigger**?
options: Its primary focus is serializability guarantee in transactions.
Its primary focus is elimination of partial dependencies.
Its primary focus is automatic event-driven code block.
Its primary focus is reverting uncommitted transactional modifications.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Database Trigger** is: **automatic event-driven code block**.

slides.question: Q36: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Stored Procedure**?
options: Its primary focus is concurrent write overwrite anomaly.
Its primary focus is precompiled database SQL package.
Its primary focus is elimination of transitive dependencies.
Its primary focus is multi-table data retrieval operation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Stored Procedure** is: **precompiled database SQL package**.

slides.question: Q37: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Primary Key**?
options: Its primary focus is row unique identifier constraint.
Its primary focus is theoretical query language foundation.
Its primary focus is eliminating overlapping candidate key anomalies.
Its primary focus is reading uncommitted transaction modifications.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Primary Key** is: **row unique identifier constraint**.

slides.question: Q38: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Candidate Key**?
options: Its primary focus is minimal row identifier set.
Its primary focus is reading committed concurrent modifications.
Its primary focus is transaction reliability standards.
Its primary focus is virtual table query abstraction.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Candidate Key** is: **minimal row identifier set**.

slides.question: Q39: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Referential Integrity**?
options: Its primary focus is referential integrity constraint.
Its primary focus is non-relational schema-less storage.
Its primary focus is valid foreign-to-primary key reference state.
Its primary focus is reading committed concurrent insertions.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Referential Integrity** is: **valid foreign-to-primary key reference state**.

slides.question: Q40: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Data Redundancy**?
options: Its primary focus is logical database structure visualization.
Its primary focus is efficient execution plan selector.
Its primary focus is unnecessary duplicate data storage.
Its primary focus is disk-optimized indexing structure.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Data Redundancy** is: **unnecessary duplicate data storage**.

slides.question: Q41: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Black-box Testing**?
options: Its primary focus is 128-bit internet address space standard.
Its primary focus is internet autonomous routing protocol.
Its primary focus is functional specification validation.
Its primary focus is standardized software visualization diagrams.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Black-box Testing** is: **functional specification validation**.

slides.question: Q42: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **White-box Testing**?
options: Its primary focus is single shared-key cryptography.
Its primary focus is internal code path validation.
Its primary focus is formal software requirements specifications.
Its primary focus is flexible iterative development paradigm.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **White-box Testing** is: **internal code path validation**.

slides.question: Q43: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Software Architecture**?
options: Its primary focus is public-private key pair cryptography.
Its primary focus is reusable architectural solution blueprint.
Its primary focus is high-level structural system organization.
Its primary focus is improving code quality without behavior change.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Software Architecture** is: **high-level structural system organization**.

slides.question: Q44: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Scrum Framework**?
options: Its primary focus is 7-layer abstraction framework.
Its primary focus is isolated component validation.
Its primary focus is internet address resolution directory.
Its primary focus is sprint-based team collaboration.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Scrum Framework** is: **sprint-based team collaboration**.

slides.question: Q45: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Cohesion**?
options: Its primary focus is reliable internet transport framework.
Its primary focus is IP to MAC address resolver.
Its primary focus is distributed source control management.
Its primary focus is single module functional focus score.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Cohesion** is: **single module functional focus score**.

slides.question: Q46: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Coupling**?
options: Its primary focus is IP address segmentation tool.
Its primary focus is traffic filtering barrier.
Its primary focus is automated deployment automation.
Its primary focus is inter-module interdependence indicator.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Coupling** is: **inter-module interdependence indicator**.

slides.question: Q47: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **SDLC Model**?
options: Its primary focus is internet autonomous routing protocol.
Its primary focus is functional specification validation.
Its primary focus is 128-bit internet address space standard.
Its primary focus is software development process model.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **SDLC Model** is: **software development process model**.

slides.question: Q48: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **UML Diagrams**?
options: Its primary focus is internal code path validation.
Its primary focus is single shared-key cryptography.
Its primary focus is flexible iterative development paradigm.
Its primary focus is standardized software visualization diagrams.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **UML Diagrams** is: **standardized software visualization diagrams**.

slides.question: Q49: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **SRS Document**?
options: Its primary focus is reusable architectural solution blueprint.
Its primary focus is formal software requirements specifications.
Its primary focus is high-level structural system organization.
Its primary focus is public-private key pair cryptography.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **SRS Document** is: **formal software requirements specifications**.

slides.question: Q50: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Refactoring**?
options: Its primary focus is improving code quality without behavior change.
Its primary focus is internet address resolution directory.
Its primary focus is sprint-based team collaboration.
Its primary focus is isolated component validation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Refactoring** is: **improving code quality without behavior change**.
